---
name: Structure feedback
about: Feedback on the documentation structure and organisation
title: "[Structure] "
labels: structure
---

**Please note:**  
Ignore factual accuracy (commands, paths, missing detail).  
We are testing structure only.

---

## What you were trying to do

Briefly describe the task or goal you had in mind.

---

## What felt wrong

What did not make sense in the structure?

- something hard to find  
- something in the wrong place  
- something unclear  

---

## Where this occurred

Link to the page(s) or section(s).

---

## What you expected instead

How would you expect this to be structured?

---

## Optional

- [ ] This content has no clear place in the current structure  
- [ ] This feels duplicated across sections  
- [ ] The boundary between sections is unclear
